---
title: "5.3.1 AI Tools for Real-Time Environmental Scanning"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
toc-location: body
---






  
  




::: {.callout-note}
## Lesson details

Estimated time: 30 minutes  





Label: 5.3.1

:::


















[Next: 5.3.2 Trend Analysis in Higher Education using GenAI](module-1-lesson-02-trend-analysis-in-higher-education-using-genai.qmd) →





## Learning objectives

- (Add learning objectives)







  

    
# Provenance Test Lesson Content

This is a file-based lesson source used to validate explain provenance output.


    
  







  
    
  








---

### Framework alignment
This lesson sits within: **CloudPedagogy AI Capability Framework (2026 Edition)**  
Domains: Awareness, Co-Agency, Applied Practice & Innovation, Ethics, Equity & Impact, Decision-Making & Governance, Reflection, Learning & Renewal

---


















[Next: 5.3.2 Trend Analysis in Higher Education using GenAI](module-1-lesson-02-trend-analysis-in-higher-education-using-genai.qmd) →
